title: Evangelize My Desktop
wikitext: []: "Evangelize" My Desktop             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Tue Aug 18, 2009 12:11 pm Hey Everybody! Uhmm Id like some help, I hae a little project going on where I want make all my computers have the "evangelion" look to them. I was thinking of trying to make them look like the MAGI, a nice magi like wallpaper and maybe some neat icons the fit with it, or if I should use rocket dock or a toolbar for icons. Im open to any ideas. Id prefer if you can give me links to the resources I might need(the aformentioned wallpaper, possible system theme, icons packs etc.) thanks in advance. EDIT: I forgot to mention, Im running WIndows XP SP3 on all computers.

Article: Evangelize My Desktop
[]: "Evangelize" My Desktop             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Tue Aug 18, 2009 12:11 pm Hey Everybody! Uhmm Id like some help, I hae a little project going on where I want make all my computers have the "evangelion" look to them. I was thinking of trying to make them look like the MAGI, a nice magi like wallpaper and maybe some neat icons the fit with it, or if I should use rocket dock or a toolbar for icons. Im open to any ideas. Id prefer if you can give me links to the resources I might need(the aformentioned wallpaper, possible system theme, icons packs etc.) thanks in advance.
